items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the Instagram bio link integration, but the evidence provided does not confirm its existence or functionality. While the linked use case outlines the need for this integration, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate it is satisfied. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence is lacking.
